title: aspidium reptans var. radicans
intro: Aspidium reptans var. radicans, also known as English ivy or Polypodium radicans, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and improving overall health. English ivy can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems.
